parsed.summary: Increase protocol grants budget by 10% to fund security audits and accessibility improvements.
parsed.recommendation: Conditional support; objectives are beneficial but funding mechanism must be clarified before execution.
risks: Unspecified funding source could deplete treasury reserves or cause token inflation
Low voter turnout may result in a vocal minority dictating budget increases
Vague allocation criteria may lead to inefficient grant distribution
unknowns: Absolute financial value of the 10% increase
Specific criteria for grant allocation and success metrics
